title: Gurdwara Paonta Sahib

overview.short: Gurdwara Paonta Sahib is a noted gurdwara in Paonta Sahib, district of Sirmaur, Himachal Pradesh.
overview.description: Gurdwara Paonta Sahib is a noted gurdwara in Paonta Sahib, district of Sirmaur, Himachal Pradesh.

topPlaces.name: Paonta Sahib
topPlaces.description: Paonta Sahib is an industrial city of Himachal Pradesh in India. It is located in the south of Sirmaur district, on National Highway 72 (New NH 7) in Kyarda Doon valley.

topPlaces.name: Bain Kuan
topPlaces.description: Bain Kuan is a small village in Tehsil Paonta sahib, district Sirmour, Himachal Pradesh, India. It is situated at Paonta-Jamniwala road which is further connected to NH-72 at Majra.

topPlaces.name: Asan Barrage
topPlaces.description: The Asan Barrage is a barrage in the Uttarakhand-Himachal Pradesh border region in Doon Valley (Dehradun district), northern India, situated at the confluence of the Eastern Yamuna Canal and the Asan River and about 11 km (7 mi) from Dakpathar, and 28 km. northwest of Dehradun in Uttarakhand.

topPlaces.name: Giri River
topPlaces.description: Giri River is a tributary of the Yamuna river that flows in the state of Himachal Pradesh in India.

topPlaces.name: Rajban
topPlaces.description: Rajban is a small town near Paonta Sahib in the Sirmaur district in the Indian state of Himachal Pradesh. Rajban is home to one of the oldest cement factories (Cement Corporation of India) in Himachal Pradesh.

items.note: Paonta Sahib is an industrial city of Himachal Pradesh in India. It is located in the south of Sirmaur district, on National Highway 72 (New NH 7) in Kyarda Doon valley.
Bain Kuan is a small village in Tehsil Paonta sahib, district Sirmour, Himachal Pradesh, India. It is situated at Paonta-Jamniwala road which is further connected to NH-72 at Majra.

The Asan Barrage is a barrage in the Uttarakhand-Himachal Pradesh border region in Doon Valley (Dehradun district), northern India, situated at the confluence of the Eastern Yamuna Canal and the Asan River and about 11 km (7 mi) from Dakpathar, and 28 km. northwest of Dehradun in Uttarakhand.
Giri River is a tributary of the Yamuna river that flows in the state of Himachal Pradesh in India.

Rajban is a small town near Paonta Sahib in the Sirmaur district in the Indian state of Himachal Pradesh. Rajban is home to one of the oldest cement factories (Cement Corporation of India) in Himachal Pradesh.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Gurdwara Paonta Sahib?
faq.a: The best time to visit Gurdwara Paonta Sahib is Mar – Jun, Sep – Nov. Summers are 15–28°C and winters are 2–16°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Gurdwara Paonta Sahib?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Dehradun Airport (Jolly Grant) (60 km) and the nearest railway station is Dehradun Railway Station (42 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Gurdwara Paonta Sahib?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Gurdwara Paonta Sahib at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Gurdwara Paonta Sahib?
faq.a: Stays in Gurdwara Paonta Sahib start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Gurdwara Paonta Sahib?
faq.a: The top attractions are Paonta Sahib, Bain Kuan, Asan Barrage, Giri River, Rajban.
